name: Radahn festival
description:
"Champions, prepare for battle! Defeat the general, gain glory, and capture this Great Rune!"

You and your friends are standing in Redmane Castle and waiting for the battle, will you come out alive, or will Radahn himself die?

#elden_ring

I have not spelled out the character of the other characters. Yes, I'm lazy, so what?
creator: Matve
